orpheus-tts.description: Orpheus TTS MCP Server - Generate speech and audiobooks with 25 voices across 8 languages

tools.name: generate_speech
tools.description: Convert text to speech using Orpheus TTS. Returns path to generated WAV file.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List all available voices for speech generation.

tools.name: get_voice_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific voice including language and supported features.

tools.name: estimate_tokens
tools.description: Estimate token count for text to help plan chunking strategy for long texts.
